This raw entry records the source location and capture metadata for ingestion into the wiki. The repository contents are not duplicated here; use the original URL as the source of truth.

## Capture Notes

- Repository: yybmion/public-apis-4Kr
- Description: 한국 서비스에 이용 가능한 Public API 모음.
- License shown on GitHub: MIT.
- README states that the list is updated for 2026 and intended to be maintained periodically.
- Major categories include government/public institutions, maps/location, regional public data, finance/payment, telecom, traffic, weather/environment, healthcare, education, real estate, culture/tourism, statistics/data, AI/machine learning, ecommerce, logistics, media/content, social/communication, energy, science/research, business, cloud, blockchain, IoT, crypto exchanges, legal, security, public safety, aviation, agriculture/fisheries, living economy, budget, Naver, and Kakao.
